title: Stackable Potions
description: Stack potions, splash potions, and lingering potions up to 16 for cleaner inventory management and better server gameplay.
body:
# Stackable Potions Plus

Vanilla potion stacks are annoying. This fixes that.

Stackable Potions Plus makes regular, splash, and lingering potions stack to 16 instead of 1, which means less inventory clutter and less chest spam during brewing, raiding, and combat prep.

## What changes
- Regular potions stack to **16**
- Splash potions stack to **16**
- Lingering potions stack to **16**

## Why use it
- Save inventory space
- Carry more potions into fights and adventures
- Reduce chest clutter in storage rooms
- Make brewing systems less painful to manage

## Good fit for
- Vanilla+ packs
- PvE and PvP servers
- Adventure maps
- Players who hate potion micromanagement

## Server/client
- Multiplayer support depends on both sides using the mod

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
